fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema

fields.description: Filesystem path for the source input or sink output, resolved relative to the run data directory.
fields.label: Path
fields.name: path

fields.description: Header output mode: 'normalized', 'original', or {field: header} mapping
fields.label: Headers
fields.name: headers

fields.description: Optional local output collision policy. 'fail_if_exists' refuses an existing write target; 'auto_increment' picks a free sibling path; 'append_or_create' is valid with append mode.
fields.label: Collision Policy
fields.name: collision_policy

fields.description: Single-character delimiter used when writing CSV fields.
fields.label: Delimiter
fields.name: delimiter

fields.description: Text encoding used when writing the CSV file.
fields.label: Encoding
fields.name: encoding

fields.description: Whether to create/replace the CSV file or append rows.
fields.label: Mode
fields.name: mode
